title: Multiple Machine Tool Setters, Operators, and Tenders, Metal and Plastic
description: Set up, operate, or tend more than one type of cutting or forming machine tool or robot.

tasks.text: Inspect workpieces for defects, and measure workpieces to determine accuracy of machine operation, using rules, templates, or other measuring instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Position, adjust, and secure stock material or workpieces against stops, on arbors, or in chucks, fixtures, or automatic feeding mechanisms, manually or using hoists.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read blueprints or job orders to determine product specifications and tooling instructions and to plan operational sequences.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select, install, and adjust alignment of drills, cutters, dies, guides, and holding devices, using templates, measuring instruments, and hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Observe machine operation to detect workpiece defects or machine malfunctions, adjusting machines as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up and operate machines, such as lathes, cutters, shears, borers, millers, grinders, presses, drills, or auxiliary machines, to make metallic and plastic workpieces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Change worn machine accessories, such as cutting tools or brushes, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set machine stops or guides to specified lengths as indicated by scales, rules, or templates.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select the proper coolants and lubricants and start their flow.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove burrs, sharp edges, rust, or scale from workpieces, using files, hand grinders, wire brushes, or power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform minor machine maintenance, such as oiling or cleaning machines, dies, or workpieces, or adding coolant to machine reservoirs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Make minor electrical and mechanical repairs and adjustments to machines and notify supervisors when major service is required.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compute data, such as gear dimensions or machine settings, applying knowledge of shop mathematics.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Start machines and turn handwheels or valves to engage feeding, cooling, and lubricating mechanisms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Move controls or mount gears, cams, or templates in machines to set feed rates and cutting speeds, depths, and angles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Instruct other workers in machine set-up and operation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record operational data, such as pressure readings, lengths of strokes, feed rates, or speeds.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Extract or lift jammed pieces from machines, using fingers, wire hooks, or lift bars.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure and mark reference points and cutting lines on workpieces, using traced templates, compasses, and rules.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write programs for computer numerical control (CNC) machines to cut metal and plastic materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Align layout marks with dies or blades.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
